description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe, predominantly black with a mesh upper that features a subtle geometric pattern for breathability. The shoe has a white and gray midsole with a visible layered structure, and a dark rubber outsole that appears durable and slightly textured. There are black laces threaded through reinforced eyelets, and a small yellow accent near the top lace hole adds a pop of color. The side of the shoe displays a swoosh-shaped logo, suggesting a sporty brand identity. The heel is slightly raised, providing extra cushioning and support, while the overall silhouette is streamlined for performance. The interior is padded, likely with foam, for comfort during extended wear.
description: A black athletic running shoe with a mesh upper, white and gray midsole, and black laces, featuring a swoosh-shaped logo and yellow accent near the top eyelet.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded heel collar, layered midsole, and subtle logo detail on the heel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the swoosh-shaped logo, mesh upper, and the layered white and gray midsole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the mesh toe box, black laces, and the overall streamlined shape of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the swoosh-shaped logo and yellow accent near the top lace hole visible.
attribute_logo: Swoosh-shaped logo on both sides of the shoe in black.
